routing.title: Routing
routing.desc: React Router DOM v6 with file-based structure. Routes configured in

zustand.title: Zustand Store
zustand.desc: Global state with persist, devtools, subscribeWithSelector. State/Actions separation pattern.

tanstack.title: Tanstack Query
tanstack.desc: Server state with caching, optimistic updates, infinite scroll, and pagination. Hooks in

dry.title: DRY
dry.desc: Extract repeated UI to common/. No copy-paste.

srp.title: SRP
srp.desc: Logic in stores/hooks. Presentation in UI primitives.

container.title: Container
container.desc: Separate data fetching from UI. Props-only components.

projectStructure.title: Project Structure
projectStructure.subtitle: Every file has a designated place. This is the standard — not a suggestion.
projectStructure.rule: When in doubt: if it fetches data → hook or api. If it renders UI → component. If it manages global state → store.

srcRoot.label: src/
srcRoot.desc: Application root. Only entry-point files live here.

appTsx.label: src/App.tsx
appTsx.desc: Root component. Wraps providers (QueryClient, Zustand, i18n). No business logic here.

mainTsx.label: src/main.tsx
mainTsx.desc: React DOM entry point. Imports global CSS and i18n. Nothing else.

i18n.label: src/i18n.ts
i18n.desc: i18next configuration: backend, language detector, namespaces. One file, no split.

pages.label: src/pages/
pages.desc: Route-level pages only. One file per route. Composed from sections and features — no raw logic.

pagesPublic.label: src/pages/public/
pagesPublic.desc: Pages accessible without authentication. e.g. home.tsx, about.tsx, error-page.tsx

pagesProtected.label: src/pages/protected/
pagesProtected.desc: Pages that require the user to be authenticated. e.g. dashboard.tsx, profile.tsx

routes.label: src/routes/
routes.desc: Router config only. createBrowserRouter, lazy imports, Suspense wrappers, errorElement.

componentsUi.label: src/components/ui/
componentsUi.desc: Unstyled-first primitives following shadcn/ui patterns. CVA variants. No business logic, no store access.

componentsCommon.label: src/components/common/
componentsCommon.desc: Shared UI blocks built from ui/ primitives. Reusable across features. No domain coupling.

componentsFeatures.label: src/components/features/
componentsFeatures.desc: Domain-coupled smart components. Connected to Zustand or Tanstack Query. e.g. Cart.tsx, UserProfile.tsx

componentsSections.label: src/components/sections/
componentsSections.desc: Large visual layout chunks. Composed from features and common components. e.g. HeroSection.tsx

componentsLayout.label: src/components/layout/
componentsLayout.desc: Global structural wrappers rendered once. e.g. Header.tsx, Footer.tsx, Sidebar.tsx

hooks.label: src/hooks/
hooks.desc: Custom hooks that are NOT tied to a specific API resource. e.g. useMediaQuery, useDebounce.

lib.label: src/lib/
lib.desc: All infrastructure: API client, endpoints, types, and resource-specific hooks.

libApi.label: src/lib/api/
libApi.desc: Axios client, base URL config, endpoint constants, and typed API functions per resource.

libHooks.label: src/lib/hooks/
libHooks.desc: Tanstack Query hooks scoped to API resources. e.g. usePosts, useUser. Not for general-purpose hooks.

store.label: src/store/
store.desc: Zustand stores. Each domain gets a slice. Context and provider wrappers live here too.

storeSlices.label: src/store/slices/
storeSlices.desc: One file per slice: State + Actions types, createSlice factory. e.g. app.slice.ts, auth.slice.ts

styles.label: src/styles/
styles.desc: Global CSS only. Theme tokens (CSS custom properties), Tailwind base layer overrides.

publicLocales.label: public/locales/
publicLocales.desc: Translation JSON files loaded at runtime by i18next. Structure: locales/{lang}/{namespace}.json

noLogicInPages.label: No logic in pages
noLogicInPages.desc: Pages only compose components. Data fetching and state go in hooks or stores.

noStoreInUi.label: No store access in ui/
noStoreInUi.desc: UI primitives receive data via props only. They must not import from store/ or lib/.

noApiInComponents.label: No API calls in components
noApiInComponents.desc: Components call hooks. Hooks call the API layer. Never call axios/fetch directly in a component.

oneSlicePerDomain.label: One slice per domain
oneSlicePerDomain.desc: Don't put unrelated state in the same slice. auth, cart, and ui are separate slices.

barrelExports.label: Always barrel-export
barrelExports.desc: Each directory exposes an index.ts. Consumers import from the folder, not the file.

kebabCase.label: kebab-case everywhere
kebabCase.desc: All files use kebab-case: use-posts.ts, user-profile.tsx. PascalCase is reserved for type names only.

use.desc: Suspend inside a component while a promise resolves — no useEffect needed.

useActionState.desc: Manages async action state (pending, error, data) returned from a Server Action.

useFormStatus.desc: Reads the pending state of the nearest parent <form> submission.

useOptimistic.desc: Apply an optimistic UI update while an async mutation is in flight.

serverActions.desc: async functions marked with "use server" that run on the server and can be called from the client.

refAsProp.desc: forwardRef is no longer needed — pass ref directly as a prop in React 19.

componentPatterns.title: Component Patterns
componentPatterns.compound: Compound components — share implicit state via context
componentPatterns.renderProps: Render props — delegate rendering to the consumer

memo.desc: Skip re-render if props are shallowly equal. Use on pure presentational components.

useMemo.desc: Memoize expensive derived values. Only when the computation is genuinely costly.

useCallback.desc: Stable function reference between renders. Required when passed to memo-wrapped children.

lazy.desc: Code-split routes and heavy components. Reduces initial bundle size.

inlineObjects.desc: Don't create objects/arrays in JSX — they break shallow equality and cause re-renders.

selector.desc: In Zustand, select only the slice you need — not the whole store object.

useReducer.desc: Prefer over useState when state transitions are complex or interdependent.

useRef.desc: DOM access or mutable value that must NOT trigger a re-render.

useContext.desc: Always type the context value. Throw if used outside provider.

customRules.desc: Name starts with "use". No conditionals around hook calls. Return stable values.

cleanup.desc: Always return a cleanup function for subscriptions, timers, and event listeners.

effectAsEvent.desc: Don't use useEffect to react to user actions — use event handlers instead.
